title: ChatUtils
description: A lightweight Minecraft client-side chat utilities mod.
body: # ChatUtils ### What it does It's most significant features include (but are not limited to): * Increased the maximum amount of chat messages from 100 to 16,384 * Compact Chat * Animated Chat * Chat Heads * Timestamps * Transparent Chat * Don't clear the Chat History on disconnect ### Hotkeys: (Configurable in Controls Menu) - B - Opens Configuration Gui ### Commands: - /chatutils - Opens Configuration Gui ### Incompatible Mods Labymod, Patcher & PolyPtcher, Hychat if your game crashes or the mod fails to work, remove these from modlist.
